title: N2 accident: Minor injuries for 5 occupants
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Five people were injured in an accident in the George-bound lane on the N2 near Dana Bay this morning, Thursday 22 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Five people were injured in an accident in the George-bound lane on the N2 near Dana Bay this morning, Thursday 22 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said: “The police responded to the scene at 07:30 and found other emergency personnel on the scene and the white GWM bakkie overturned, and several injured were receiving medical attention.”","html":"The KwaNonqaba Police’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said: “The police responded to the scene at 07:30 and found other emergency personnel on the scene and the white GWM bakkie overturned, and several injured were receiving medical attention.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kapp said five people, all occupants of the bakkie, were hospitalised with minor injuries, and the police have opened docket for reckless and negligent driving.","html":"Kapp said five people, all occupants of the bakkie, were hospitalised with minor injuries, and the police have opened docket for reckless and negligent driving."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The cause of the accident is being investigated.","html":"The cause of the accident is being investigated."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: N2 accident: Minor injuries for 5 occupants
